scripts.dev: concurrently -n 'backend,worker,frontend' --prefix-colors 'cyan,yellow,magenta' 'npm run dev -w packages/backend' 'npm run dev -w packages/worker' 'npm run dev -w packages/frontend'
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run build -w packages/worker && npm run build -w packages/frontend
